hypothesis: Adding an explicit, machine-checked evolutionary layer (bounded mutation budget + evidence-driven selection + validated inheritance) on top of the spiral gate turns 'mutation and evolution' from a slogan into a gate, so controlled variation cannot become random self-modification or a rename for ordinary iteration.

changeable: the evolution-variant ledger schema and its checker
the SKILL routing keywords and the loop-engineering / process / sources references
the residency markers and CI wiring for the new gate
immutable: the spiral safety floor (DND, approval, security, credential, deploy, external-mutation, meeting-join, owner-escalation, branch/merge, secret, runtime-install gates)
the residency fail-closed posture and the #43 review-calibration contract
the existing spiral revolution gate and its records
mutation_budget.blast_radius: One schema + one checker (reusing the spiral gate's verified primitives) + one dogfooded record + the 4-copy skill-tree docs and mirrors; no runtime/credential/deploy/process-authority mutation.

fitness_metric: Red->green objective gate: evolution_variant_check.py FAILs on an unbounded or unmeasured mutation (safety-floor surface listed as changeable, prose/empty selection evidence, inherit-without-accept) and PASSes only on a bounded, evidence-backed, accepted variant; selftest red-locks each bypass.

selection.baseline_comparison: Baseline: the spiral gate enforced altitude + evidence pairing + per-/cross-record review calibration, but had no notion of bounded mutation, selection fitness, or validated inheritance. This variant adds those as enforcement, reusing (not cloning) the spiral gate's concrete-reference and review-calibration primitives.

inheritance_decision.template_change: The bounded evolutionary operator layer (mutation budget, evidence-driven selection, validated inheritance, lineage, extinction/quarantine) joins the validated governance template carried forward by spiral engineering; the delivery strand is still re-synthesized per effort.
inheritance_decision.rationale: It is validated by an objective red->green gate wired into CI and reviewed with explicit refute-pass by Codex + MISA3, and it strictly preserves the safety floor (the checker rejects any variant that lists a safety-floor surface as changeable).

rollback_plan: Delete this record, scripts/evolution_variant_check.py, schemas/evolution-variant-ledger.schema.json, and the evolutionary-layer doc sections; remove the CI step and residency markers. The spiral revolution gate and all prior records remain intact and green.
extinction_quarantine: Every discovered bypass (safety-floor-in-changeable, credential mutation, empty/unbounded budget, prose/empty selection evidence, !safety_floor_preserved, inherit-without-accept, prose lineage, bare-#N parent) is red-locked in --selftest, so a harmful variant pattern cannot silently reappear; the gate runs in CI on every PR.
safety_floor: Unchanged: DND, approval, security, credential, deploy, external-mutation, meeting-join, owner-escalation, branch/merge, secret, and runtime-install gates outrank any mutation. Random mutation is not permission to self-modify production process; no silent self-modification.
